videos.headline: Taylen Green expresses pride in Arkansas' performance vs. Alabama A&M
videos.description: Green reflects on his qb performance after throwing for 322 yards and six touchdowns and describes how the chemistry between the Razorbacks impacted their victory vs. the Bulldogs.
